case_title: THE CITY TOW VS SOUKHOV, ALEXANDRE

docket_entries.description: MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE CITY TOW HEARING SET FOR APR-10-2001 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION MAR-01-2001, CONTINUED BY COURT TO APR-20-2001 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 IF THERE ARE NO APPEARANCES ON 4/20/01, THE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE.
